title: Externalize skills.py backend skills directory to config
description: Remove _BACKEND_SKILLS_DIR dict from skills.py. Change prepare_isolated_execution_root signature to accept config: OrchestratorConfig and runner_backend: str. Replace _BACKEND_SKILLS_DIR.get() with config.backend(runner_backend).skills_dir. Update the caller in scheduler.py to pass self.config. Keep AGENT_SKILL_ALLOWLIST as a module-level constant with a comment explaining why it is intentionally not externalized.
acceptance_criteria: prepare_isolated_execution_root accepts config and runner_backend parameters
Caller in scheduler.py passes self.config to prepare_isolated_execution_root
AGENT_SKILL_ALLOWLIST remains as module-level constant with explanatory comment
Claude Code backend uses .claude skills dir, Codex uses .agents
